raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (GPT-4) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical differences.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags missing citations for specific models and methods, such as versions of GPT-3.5-turbo, GPT-4, Claude-Haiku, and Llama-3-8B, but does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, including the arithmetic/logical inconsistency in the headline comparison, overclaims about prior art, and circularity in quality estimation.",
    "RX.3": "The agent's output covers exactly the agreed active set of dimensions without any drift.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies and corrects potential harmful patterns in the original text, such as overclaims and logical inconsistencies, ensuring no new errors or regressions are introduced.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides detailed annotations for every non-cosmetic change, explaining the source and reason for each revision."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (GPT-4) and articulates the delta, but does not map against multiple works or identify sharp vs rhetorical differences.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags missing citations for specific models and methods, such as versions of GPT-3.5-turbo, GPT-4, Claude-Haiku, and Llama-3-8B, but does not audit every load-bearing citation or flag missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, including the arithmetic/logical inconsistency in the headline comparison, overclaims about prior art, and circularity in quality estimation.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's output covers exactly the agreed active set of dimensions without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies and corrects potential harmful patterns in the original text, such as overclaims and logical inconsistencies, ensuring no new errors or regressions are introduced.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides detailed annotations for every non-cosmetic change, explaining the source and reason for each revision.
